candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; includes all operating revenue and is labeled as total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income from associates and joint ventures
candidates.why: Income from associates is below operating profit and not core revenue; excluded in favor of Total Revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue; excluded.
Investment income, not core operating revenue; excluded.
Includes net income plus OCI; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income items from associated companies
candidates.why: OCI component, not revenue.
Net income plus OCI; not revenue.
Balance sheet liability; not revenue line.
Direct cost of sales; standard COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Change in stock of biological assets at cost, raw materials and finished poducts
candidates.why: Inventory/biological asset change adjustment; may affect gross margin but is not the primary COGS line; kept as secondary consideration only.
Overhead/operating expenses, not direct COGS.
Net operating figure including multiple components; not a pure COGS line.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financial result, not COGS.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Generic staff expenses heading; not needed since a more specific COGS line exists.
Mixed income/expense bucket; not COGS.
Specific provision expense, not direct cost of sales.
Balance sheet inventory component, not income statement COGS line.
Personnel/overhead costs typical of SG&A.
Operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A.
Equity-based compensation usually included in SG&A.
Mixed operating income/expense bucket; likely contains additional SG&A-type items.

variables.notes: Selected main operating overhead components as no single explicit SG&A line exists; excluded any totals/subtotals and non-operating items.
No research & development related row found in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews; treating R&D expense as not separately reported (0 for PROF purposes).

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; excluded but noted as related.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense on lease liabilities; good candidate for interest expense component.
Main interest expense line; best overall proxy for XINT.
Additional specified interest costs; relevant backup if primary lines are missing.
Capitalized interest, not period expense; generally excluded from XINT.
Equity attribution, not interest expense; excluded.
Equity attribution, not interest expense; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; secondary to main lease interest line.
Balance sheet liability for interest owed; not the P&L expense itself.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest.
Equity, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so later processing can take the first available interest expense figure each year; lease interest and specified interest act as backups to the main Interest Expenses line.

candidates.why: Component of equity attributable to owners but not the full equity figure; prefer aggregate owner equity line.
Retained/earned equity component, not total owner equity.
Portion of equity, not total; excludes share capital etc.
Represents equity attributable to owners (excluding non-controlling interests), as evidenced by separate Non-controlling interests and higher Total equity line; best BE choice.
Appears to equal Total Equity plus Non-controlling interests, i.e., total including minorities; not suitable for BE when MIB is modeled separately.
Sum of equity and debt; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Total Equity appears to exclude Non-controlling interests (which are listed separately and then summed into Total equity), making it the appropriate owner/parent equity measure for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit; not the balance sheet minority interest but confirms presence of NCI.
Income attributable to parent; not minority interest.
Balance sheet line for minority interests in equity; primary choice for MIB.
Duplicate / alternative label for non-controlling interests with identical values; good secondary fallback.

variables.notes: Both balance sheet labels represent minority interest; provided as a priority list so if one is missing in some years the other can be used without double counting.
